title: Mahindra Navistar is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Mahindra Navistar is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Mahindra Navistar invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Lucknow location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Mahindra Navistar:
Mahindra Navistar is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Navistar!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
